steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content:
The phrase “many of the companies could not operate if they had to do everything necessary to find investors for themselves” reveals what the blank must mean.

Companies cannot operate under that condition — so the blank describes something that is a serious obstacle or barrier, not something neutral or positive.

steps.title: Match the obstacle to the word
steps.content:
Prohibitive means preventing something from being done, or making it impossible or impractical due to cost or difficulty.

The passage establishes that finding investors requires significant time and expense; without the exchange, this burden would be prohibitive—companies could not afford or manage it.

The other choices fail: “distinctive” names a characteristic (not an obstacle), “misconstrued” refers to misunderstanding (not a burden), and “beneficial” is the opposite of what we need.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
